ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – July 10-20
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from July 10th to July 20th with limited access to email. I will have no internet access during this time. For any urgent matters, please reach out to Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com). Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our security system has flagged unusual activity on your crypto wallet and has temporarily suspended it to protect your assets. To restore full access, you must verify your identity within 24 hours.

Please click on the following link to complete the verification process: <URL>

Failure to respond within the specified time will result in a permanent lock of your wallet. If you do not wish to lose your funds, act now!

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
Security Team
XYZ Crypto Exchange
